expectations.text: Recommends `winml inspect` as the cheapest first check (config-only).
expectations.evidence: No winml inspect. Suggests manually reading `config.json` on the HF page.
No winml analyze. Suggests running ORT's graph optimizer standalone + manually checking partition reports.

expectations.text: Does NOT just say 'build and see'.
